name: New Mexico Pinto Beans
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound Salt pork or cubed bacon
1 teaspoon Salt, or more to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and pick over the beans, removing loose skins or shriveled beans.
2. Place in a large covered pot and cover with hot water.
3. Soak overnight if desired to reduce cooking time.
4. When the beans begin to simmer, add the ham bone, salt pork, or bacon.
5. Add more hot or boiling water as needed, but avoid cold water as it will cause the beans to turn dark.
6. If cooked uncovered, the beans may also darken in color.
7. Beans are done when the skins are nearly as tender as the inside of the beans and there are no breaks.
8. Add salt and allow to stand before serving.
